keys.description: Default value for Team.capacity when the create path doesn't set it explicitly. Null = no cap.
Default value for Team.capacity_waitlist. Null = no waitlist.
Hard ceiling on Team.capacity — a tenant cannot configure a team of more than 500 members even on Enterprise. Guards against unrealistic values that would break roster + attendance UI.
Hard ceiling on Team.capacity_waitlist.
Default (registration_closes_at - registration_opens_at) window when the caller doesn't specify.
OpenClosePendingRegistrationsJob runs every N minutes. Lowering below 5 stresses the scheduler; raising above 15 causes UI drift where the team status shows 'closing at HH:MM' after the moment.
When true, TeamRegistrationOpened fires TeamRegistrationOpeningNotification to age + gender-matched members. When false, only the roster admin sees the state change.
Default trial_type when the schedule path doesn't specify.
CloseExpiredTrialsJob transitions in_progress trials past ends_at + this many hours to completed. Coaches get a nudge notification 24h before the auto-complete.
Hard cap on TeamTrial.session_count. Values above this suggest the tenant should model this as a team membership, not a trial.
How many hours before starts_at to dispatch trialist reminders. Two-shot default (24h + 1h). Set to [] to disable.
For trial rows that resolved to rejected/no_show/cancelled AND the trialist is anonymous: redact first/last name + phone + email + dob this many days after decided_at.
Rejected trials retained this many years for anti-discrimination defence records.
ReconcileTeamMemberActiveInvariantJob scans this many team rows per pass.
Baseline for the reconciler alerts. Any finding above this is a P1 signal.
PurgeArchivedTeamsJob hard-deletes archived teams past this many days IF no downstream row references them.

Static registry for PolymorphicTeamMemberResolver. Wave 3 sports + Wave 2b staff modules ADD entries here at boot — the Wave 2 default only wires the `user` binding; the others are placeholders that raise a clear error until the owning module lands.
In production: false — the observer refuses roster creates whose member_type has no registered resolver. In testing: true — allows fixtures for future waves without loading the whole platform.
When true, AgeEligibilityGate refuses roster-add for athletes outside team.min_age/max_age. Skipped when the athlete has no dob.
When true, GenderEligibilityGate refuses roster-add when member.gender doesn't match team.gender_category (unless team.gender_category='any').
When false, teams with min_age<18 AND gender_category='mixed' are refused at create-time. Explicit opt-in via tenant settings.
When true, TeamCoachChangedNotification fires only when team.min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18. When false, every coach change notifies. Default is true — adult-only teams get quieter coach transitions.
